svg.title: Multi-Agentic RAG Architecture
svg.desc: LangGraph-based multi-agent RAG system with 7 agents: Orchestrator, Planner, Researcher, Reranker, Analyst, Critic, and Synthesizer, with a reflection loop and 3 Pinecone domain indexes

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user query enter the multi-agent RAG system?')
sendPrompt('What does the Orchestrator agent do in multi-agent RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the Planner agent decompose queries?')
sendPrompt('How does the Researcher agent retrieve from multiple Pinecone indexes?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the orders Pinecone index?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the products Pinecone index?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the support Pinecone index?')
sendPrompt('How does the Reranker agent work in multi-agent RAG?')
sendPrompt('What does the Analyst agent do in multi-agent RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the Critic agent verify answers and detect gaps?')
sendPrompt('How does the Synthesizer produce the final answer?')
sendPrompt('How does the memory module work in multi-agent RAG?')
sendPrompt('What does the final answer look like?')
